lightning_description: Izikhwama ze-Lightning zikuvumela ukuthumela i-Bitcoin ngokushesha nangesimali esiphansi ngenkathi usagcina ubulawuli bakho.
lightning_s1_c1: I-Lightning ikuvumela ukuthumela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ngokushesha nangesimali esiphansi.
lightning_s1_c2: Kubalulekile ukwazi ukuthi ukusebenzisa i-lightning kuza nokulahlekelwa. Ngokuguqulwa kwezinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ezisheshayo, ezishibhile, ngokuvamile ulahlekelwa ukuphepha okuthile.
lightning_s1_c3: Ngokuvamile, i-Lightning kumele isetshenziswe ngezinani ezincane ze-bitcoin kuphela. Kumele ugcine izinani ezinkulu ze-bitcoin esikhwameni se-hardware kuphela.
lightning_s1_c4: Bheka Umhlahlandlela Wethu Wesikhwama se-Hardware ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe.
lightning_s1_c5: Akuzona zonke izikhwama ze-Lightning ezifanayo. Ungathola ukuthi yisiphi isikhwama esinekuhlangana okufanele kuwe ngokubuza umbuzo owodwa olula:
lightning_s2_c1: Enye yezinto ezintsha ze-Bitcoin amandla okuyigcina ngaphandle kokuncika kumgcini, njengobhange. Izikhwama zokuzigcinela zivula amandla aphelele e-Bitcoin.
lightning_s2_c2: Ngesikhwama sokuzigcinela, nguwe wedwa onamandla okusebenzisa noma ukudlulisela imali yakho. Akekho ongakuvimba, akuvinjeleke, noma akwebe lapho usebenzisa isikhwama sokuzigcinela. Lezi zibizwa futhi ngokuthi izikhwama ezingagciniwe.
lightning_s2_c3: Indlela enobuphathimandla kakhulu yokusebenzisa i-Lightning ukusebenzisa i-node yakho.
lightning_s2_c4: Lo mhlahlandlela ugxile ezikhwameni ze-Lightning ezilula ezingadingi i-node yakho.
lightning_s2_c5: Kubalulekile ukwazi ukuthi ngisho usebenzisa isikhwama se-Lightning esingagciniwe, usamethembe umdali wesikhwama ukuthi angaphusha isibuyekezo sohlelo lokusebenza olubi futhi ebe imali yakho.
lightning_s3_c1: Izikhwama ezigciniwe yizikhwama lapho ungalawuli khona imali yakho.
lightning_s3_c2: Lezi zikhwama zifana kakhulu nesis-timu yamabhange lapho kumele uthembe umuntu wesithathu ukukunika ukufinyelela emalini yakho. Uma i-Bitcoin yakho iku-exchange, usebenzisa isikhwama esigciniwe.
lightning_s3_c3: Izikhwama ezigciniwe zingabonakala zilula, kodwa umgcini unamandla ezobuchwepheshe okweba yonke imali yabasebenzisi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.
lightning_s3_c4: Abanye abantu bakhetha izikhwama ze-Lightning ezigciniwe ngezinani ezincane ze-bitcoin ngenxa yokulula kwazo. Khumbula nje: hhayi okhiye bakho, hhayi izinhlamvu zakho!
lightning_s4_c1: Ngako konke lokhu okusemqondweni, ungakhetha manje isikhwama se-lightning esinekuhlangana okufanele kuwe.
lightning_cta_hardware: Ufuna Umhlahlandlela Wethu Wesikhwama se-Bitcoin Hardware?
